arabicText: إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى
englishText: Actions are judged by intentions, and every person will get the reward according to what he has intended.
arabicNarrator: عُمَرُ بنُ الخَطَّابِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated 'Umar bin Al-Khattab (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: الإِسْلامُ أَنْ تَشْهَدَ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ، وَتُقِيمَ الصَّلاةَ، وَتُؤْتِيَ الزَّكَاةَ، وَتَصُومَ رَمَضَانَ، وَتَحُجَّ البَيْتَ إِنِ اسْتَطَعْتَ إِلَيْهِ سَبِيلًا
englishText: Islam is that you testify that there is no god but Allah and that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah, establish prayer, give zakat, fast Ramadan, and perform pilgrimage to the House if you are able.
arabicNarrator: عَبدُ اللهِ بنُ عُمَرَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُما
englishNarrator: Narrated 'Abdullah bin 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with them)

arabicText: الدِّينُ النَّصِيحَةُ، قُلْنَا: لِمَنْ؟ قَالَ: للَّهِ وَلِكِتَابِهِ وَلِرَسُولِهِ وَلأَئِمَّةِ المُسْلِمِينَ وَعَامَّتِهِمْ
englishText: The religion is sincerity. We said: To whom? He said: To Allah, His Book, His Messenger, the leaders of the Muslims, and their common people.
arabicNarrator: تَمِيمٌ الدَّارِيُّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Tamim Al-Dari (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: لَا يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لِأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
englishText: None of you will have faith till he likes for his (Muslim) brother what he likes for himself.
arabicNarrator: أَنَسُ بنُ مَالِكٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Anas bin Malik (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَاليَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
englishText: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should say something good or remain silent.
arabicNarrator: أَبُو هُرَيرَةَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Abu Huraira (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: مَثَلُ مَا بَعَثَنِي اللَّهُ بِهِ مِنَ الهُدَى وَالعِلْمِ كَمَثَلِ الغَيْثِ الكَثِيرِ أَصَابَ أَرْضًا، فَكَانَ مِنْهَا نَقِيَّةٌ قَبِلَتِ المَاءَ فَأَنْبَتَتِ الكَلَأَ وَالعُشْبَ الكَثِيرَ
englishText: The example of guidance and knowledge with which Allah has sent me is like abundant rain falling on the earth, some of which was fertile soil that absorbed rain water and brought forth vegetation and grass in abundance.
arabicNarrator: أَبُو مُوسَى الأَشعَرِيُّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Abu Musa Al-Ash'ari (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: طَلَبُ العِلمِ فَرِيضَةٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسلِمٍ
englishText: Seeking knowledge is an obligation upon every Muslim.
arabicNarrator: أَنَسُ بنُ مَالِكٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Anas bin Malik (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: اتَّقِ اللَّهَ حَيثُمَا كُنتَ، وَأَتبِعِ السَّيِّئَةَ الحَسَنَةَ تَمحُهَا، وَخَالِقِ النَّاسَ بِخُلُقٍ حَسَنٍ
englishText: Fear Allah wherever you may be. Follow up a bad deed with a good one, it will erase it. And treat people with good character.
arabicNarrator: مُعَاذُ بنُ جَبَلٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Mu'adh bin Jabal (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: الطَّهُورُ شَطرُ الإِيمَانِ، وَالحَمدُ للهِ تَملَأُ المِيزَانَ، وَسُبحَانَ اللهِ وَالحَمدُ للهِ تَملَآنِ أَوْ تَملَأُ مَا بَينَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرضِ
englishText: Purity is half of faith. Alhamdulillah fills the scales. SubhanAllah and Alhamdulillah fill up what is between the heavens and the earth.
arabicNarrator: أَبُو مَالِكٍ الأَشعَرِيُّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Abu Malik Al-Ash'ari (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: أَفضَلُ الإِسلامِ مَن سَلِمَ المُسلِمُونَ مِن لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
englishText: The best of Muslims is the one from whose tongue and hands the Muslims are safe.
arabicNarrator: عَبدُ اللهِ بنُ عَمرٍو رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُما
englishNarrator: Narrated 'Abdullah bin 'Amr (May Allah be pleased with them)

arabicText: مَن كَانَ آخِرُ كَلَامِهِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ دَخَلَ الجَنَّةَ
englishText: Whoever's last words are 'La ilaha illa Allah' shall enter Paradise.
arabicNarrator: مُعَاذُ بنُ جَبَلٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Mu'adh bin Jabal (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: خَيرُكُم مَن تَعَلَّمَ القُرآنَ وَعَلَّمَهُ
englishText: The best of you are those who learn the Quran and teach it.
arabicNarrator: عُثمَانُ بنُ عَفَّانَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated 'Uthman bin 'Affan (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: يَقُولُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى: أَنَا عِندَ ظَنِّ عَبدِي بِي، وَأَنَا مَعَهُ إِذَا ذَكَرَنِي
englishText: Allah the Most High says: I am as My servant thinks of Me, and I am with him when he remembers Me.
arabicNarrator: أَبُو هُرَيرَةَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Abu Huraira (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: الرَّاحِمُونَ يَرحَمُهُمُ الرَّحمَنُ، ارحَمُوا مَن فِي الأَرضِ يَرحَمكُم مَن فِي السَّمَاءِ
englishText: The merciful will be shown mercy by the Most Merciful. Be merciful to those on earth and the One in the heavens will have mercy upon you.
arabicNarrator: عَبدُ اللهِ بنُ عَمرٍو رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُما
englishNarrator: Narrated 'Abdullah bin 'Amr (May Allah be pleased with them)

arabicText: الصِّيَامُ جُنَّةٌ، فَلَا يَرفُث وَلَا يَجهَل، وَإِن امرُؤٌ قَاتَلَهُ أَو شَاتَمَهُ فَليَقُل: إِنِّي صَائِمٌ مَرَّتَينِ
englishText: Fasting is a shield. So the fasting person should avoid obscenity and ignorance. If someone fights or insults him, let him say: I am fasting, twice.
arabicNarrator: أَبُو هُرَيرَةَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Abu Huraira (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: مَن أَحَبَّ لِقَاءَ اللهِ أَحَبَّ اللهُ لِقَاءَهُ، وَمَن كَرِهَ لِقَاءَ اللهِ كَرِهَ اللهُ لِقَاءَهُ
englishText: Whoever loves to meet Allah, Allah loves to meet him. And whoever hates to meet Allah, Allah hates to meet him.
arabicNarrator: عَائِشَةُ وَأَبُو مُوسَى رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُما
englishNarrator: Narrated 'Aisha and Abu Musa (May Allah be pleased with them)

arabicText: لَا تَحَاسَدُوا وَلَا تَنَاجَشُوا وَلَا تَبَاغَضُوا وَلَا تَدَابَرُوا وَلَا يَبِع بَعضُكُم عَلَى بَيعِ بَعضٍ وَكُونُوا عِبَادَ اللَّهِ إِخوَانًا
englishText: Do not envy one another, do not inflate prices against one another, do not hate one another, do not turn away from one another, and do not undercut one another's sales. Be servants of Allah and brothers.
arabicNarrator: أَبُو هُرَيرَةَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Abu Huraira (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: أَكمَلُ المُؤمِنِينَ إِيمَانًا أَحسَنُهُم خُلُقًا، وَخِيَارُكُم خِيَارُكُم لِنِسَائِهِم
englishText: The most complete of the believers in faith is the one with the best character. And the best of you are those who are best to their wives.
arabicNarrator: أَبُو هُرَيرَةَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Abu Huraira (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يَنظُرُ إِلَى صُوَرِكُم وَأَموَالِكُم، وَلَكِن يَنظُرُ إِلَى قُلُوبِكُم وَأَعمَالِكُم
englishText: Verily, Allah does not look at your appearances or your wealth, but He looks at your hearts and your deeds.
arabicNarrator: أَبُو هُرَيرَةَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُ
englishNarrator: Narrated Abu Huraira (May Allah be pleased with him)

arabicText: إِنَّ مِن أَحَبِّكُم إِلَيَّ وَأَقرَبِكُم مِنِّي مَجلِسًا يَومَ القِيَامَةِ أَحَاسِنَكُم أَخلَاقًا
englishText: Indeed, among the most beloved of you to me and the closest to me in seat on the Day of Resurrection are those of you with the best character.
arabicNarrator: جَابِرُ بنُ عَبدِ اللهِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنهُما
englishNarrator: Narrated Jabir bin 'Abdullah (May Allah be pleased with them)
